zh.lifeSummary: 當Griffith Ap Griffith Gwyr於大約1198年出生在英國威爾斯布雷康史爾格林塔維時，他的父親Gruffudd Gwyr ap Cydifor29歲，母親Catrin verch Elidir Marchog30歲。他和Jane Fleming至少有5個兒子和1個女兒。

nameMeanings.name: Ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of   Abt  .

Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): habitational name from Apt, the Yiddish name of Opatów in Świętokrzyskie Voivodeship, Poland. The placename (in German, Yiddish, and Polish) is from a root meaning ‘abbot’, the place having been named for the local abbey. Compare   Abt  .

variants.name: Abt
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Helmut, Horst, Johann, Kurt.

German and Dutch: from Middle Low German or Middle Dutch abt ‘abbot’, hence a metonymic occupational name for a servant of an abbot or a nickname for someone thought to resemble an abbot in some way. In some instances it may have been a topographic or habitational name referring to a house named with this word.
Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): variant of   Abt  , a habitational name from Opatów in Poland.

variants.name: Apter
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Avrohom, Bronya, Eliezer, Naftali.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name for someone from Apt (see   Apt  ).
English: habitational name from Aptor in Marldon, Devon, composed of Old English uppe ‘up, above’ + torr ‘rocky outcrop’.

nameMeanings.name: Griffith
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh (Carmarthenshire and western England): from the Old Welsh personal name Gruffudd, Old Welsh Grip(p)iud, composed of the elements grip, of uncertain significance, + iud ‘chief, lord’.

variants.name: Griffieth
meanings: Variant of   Griffith  .

variants.name: Griff
meanings: English: topographic name for someone living near a pit or hollow, from Middle English grif ‘pit, hollow, narrow valley’ (Old Norse gryfja), or a habitational name from Griff in Warwickshire, Griffe in Derbyshire, or Griff Farm in Rievaulx, North Yorkshire, all probably named with this word.
Welsh and English: from the Welsh personal name Gryff, a short form of Gruffudd. See Griffith .
German: variant of   Greif   1.

variants.name: Kerfoot
meanings: English (Lancashire and Cheshire):
habitational name, probably from Carefoot, near Myerscough (Lancashire).
possibly a variant of   Griffith  .

variants.name: Griffes
meanings: Welsh: altered form of   Griffith  .

variants.name: Griffeth
meanings: Altered form of   Griffith  .

variants.name: Griffiths
meanings: Welsh (Glamorgan and western England): Anglicized form of the patronymic (ap) Gruffudd, from Old Welsh Grippiud (see Griffith ).

variants.name: Griffth
meanings: Variant of   Griffith  .

variants.name: Griffitt
meanings: Altered form of   Griffith  .

nameMeanings.name: Gwyr
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh (Glamorgan) and Irish: variant of   Gwin   or   Gwynne  .

variants.name: Gwin
meanings: Welsh: from gwyn ‘fair, white’, also sometimes ‘white-headed; favorite’. This word was widely used as a personal name in the Middle Ages. It may also be a nickname for a person with fair hair or a noticeably pale complexion. See also Winn .

nameMeanings.name: Griffith
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized form of   Gruffudd .

variants.name: Gruffudd
meanings: From Old Welsh Grip(p)iud, from an unexplained first element + a second element meaning ‘lord, prince’. Gruffydd ap Llewelyn ( d. 1063 ) was one of the most able rulers of Wales in the Middle Ages, scoring notable victories over the English until he was eventually defeated by King Harold in 1063 .

en.lifeSummary: When Griffith Ap Griffith Gwyr was born about 1198, in Glyntawe, Breconshire, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Gruffudd Gwyr ap Cydifor, was 29 and his mother, Catrin verch Elidir Marchog, was 30. He had at least 5 sons and 1 daughter with Jane Fleming.

de.lifeSummary: Als Griffith Ap Griffith Gwyr um 1198 in Glyntawe, Breconshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gruffudd Gwyr ap Cydifor 29 und seine Mutter Catrin verch Elidir Marchog 30. Er hatte mit Jane Fleming mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Griffith Ap Griffith Gwyr è nato il circa 1198 nel Glyntawe, Breconshire, Galles, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Gruffudd Gwyr ap Cydifor, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Catrin verch Elidir Marchog, aveva 30 anni. Lui avuto almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia con Jane Fleming.

ja.lifeSummary: Griffith Ap Griffith Gwyrが約1198年にイギリスウェールズブレコンシュアイアグリンタウで生まれた時，父Gruffudd Gwyr ap Cydiforは29歳，母Catrin verch Elidir Marchogは30歳であった。彼はJane Flemingとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Griffith Ap Griffith Gwyr(이)가 대략 1198년 영국 웨일스 브레콘실르 그린타w에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gruffudd Gwyr ap Cydifor(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Catrin verch Elidir Marchog(은)는 30세였다. 그는 Jane Fleming(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Griffith Ap Griffith Gwyr родился около 1198 г. в местности глинтав, брекуншир, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Gruffudd Gwyr ap Cydifor было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Catrin verch Elidir Marchog, 30. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь от Jane Fleming.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Griffith Ap Griffith Gwyr nació aproximadamente 1198, en Glyntawe, Breconshire, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Gruffudd Gwyr ap Cydifor, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Catrin verch Elidir Marchog, tenía 30 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija con Jane Fleming.
